location: Reward from Gurranq, Beast Clergyman at the Bestial Sanctum after bringing him his 7th Deathroot offering.
tactics: Reach the Bestial Sanctum via the waygate hidden behind the Third Church of Marika in northeastern Caelid (the Dragonbarrow sub-area).
Gurranq wants Deathroot items, not runes — feed him one at a time to advance his reward tier; the Beastclaw Greathammer is tied specifically to the 7th offering.
Deathroot is scattered around the open world and drops from certain bosses; check a Deathroot location list if you're short on the count.
Its one-handed heavy attack has unusually strong hitstun for a Great Hammer, letting you combo into a follow-up light attack — most colossal weapons in this class can't do that.
lore: Its striking head is shaped like five clawed beast talons, a tribute to Serosh, the Lord of Beasts who once served as regent to King Godfrey. Black claws jut out from a mane of golden fur.

builds.name: Strength/Faith beast incantation hybrid
builds.why: D-scaling in Str, Dex, and Faith plus a chunk of innate Holy damage let it pair naturally with Bestial Vow incantations and Faith-scaling talismans.
